message:
feat(beads): add comprehensive test coverage work items

Created 54 new beads covering unit test and E2E integration testing gaps:

## EPICS
- bd-1rfq: [EPIC] Comprehensive Unit Test Coverage (No Mocks)
- bd-yps6: [EPIC] E2E Integration Test Suite with Detailed Logging

## CRITICAL (P0) Unit Test Tasks
- bd-2e6f: Renderer Module (currently only 1 test!)
- bd-h3gn: ANSI Sequences Constants (0 tests)
- bd-2fv0: Porter-Duff Alpha Blending
- bd-2ei4: Cell Module Comprehensive
- bd-2q0a: ANSI Sequence Generation

## CRITICAL (P0) E2E Tasks
- bd-3le2: Enable and Stabilize PTY Tests in CI
- bd-397z: Structured Logging Harness
- bd-1z1r: PTY Test CI Integration

## HIGH PRIORITY (P1) Tasks
- bd-2zff: Terminal Raw Mode (2 tests)
- bd-2ps2: Link Pool (2 tests)
- bd-1rov: Golden File Rendering Verification
- bd-2pfc: Structured JSONL Logging
- bd-1qlr: Headless Demo Showcase Testing
- bd-35mn: CI/CD Pipeline Integration

## Subtasks with Dependencies
- Renderer: Diff Algorithm, Buffer Composition, Hit Grid
- PTY: Stabilization -> CI Infrastructure
- Golden Files: Comparison Utilities -> Test Cases

Dependency structure ensures proper ordering.
